requestType.title: Request Type
requestType.description: Use exactly Service Request, Department, Doctor, Facility, Admission Fee, Insurance, Subsidy, or Hospital Info.

searchTerm.title: Search Term
searchTerm.description: Optional exact department, doctor, ward, room type, or insurance company named by the user.

informationType.title: Information Type
informationType.description: For Service Request use Appointment or Admission. For Hospital Info use Timings, Location, Contact, or Ambulance.
